nasb.text: nor is He served by human hands, as though He needed anything, since He Himself gives to all people life and breath and all things;

esv.text: nor is he served by human hands, as though he needed anything, since he himself gives to all mankind life and breath and everything.

cnv.text: 也不受人手的服事，好像他缺少甚麼；他自己反而把生命、氣息和一切，賜給萬人。

ccb.text: 也不需要人的侍奉，因为祂一无所缺。祂将生命、气息和万物赐给世人。

csbs.text: 也不受人手的服事，好像缺少什么似的，因为他自己把生命、气息和万有赐给万人。
